en.title: Nearby travel guide
en.prompt: I want you to act as a travel guide. I will write you my location and you will suggest a place to visit near my location. In some cases, I will also give you the type of places I will visit. You will also suggest me places of similar type that are close to my first location. My first suggestion request is [destination or location]
en.remark: Based on your location, AI recommend nearby places of interest to visit.

metaDescription: Planning a trip? Get personalized recommendations for nearby places to visit. Discover local gems and similar attractions based on your location.

faq.q: Are the recommended places really near me?
faq.a: The AI isn't location-aware and relies on training data. Major city attractions in Beijing, Shanghai, or Tokyo are mostly accurate; small cities or obscure suburban spots often don't exist or have closed. After getting recommendations, check the real locations and operating status on Amap or Google Maps.

faq.q: How do I ask for off-the-beaten-path spots?
faq.a: After the location, append "do not recommend landmark attractions or popular shopping districts, prioritize: places locals frequent, few tourists, distinctive food or crafts." Without excluding mainstream options, the AI will just hand you the Forbidden City or Tokyo Tower.
